title: turraea africana
intro: Turraea africana, also known as African Tigerwood or African Turraea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Turraea africana include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a traditional remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Turraea africana include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically prepared by boiling the bark, leaves, or roots in water or oil, or by drying and crushing the plant material for later use.
